name: Fried Stuffed Jalapeno Peppers
recipeIngredient: 10 oz. can whole pickled jalapeno peppers, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut stems from peppers. Remove seeds with a small sharp knife (do not split the peppers).
2. Stuff each pepper with pimiento cheese and cover; chill at least 2 hours.
3. Combine 1/4 cup flour, 2 tablespoons cornmeal, salt, and pepper to make the batter.
4. Combine remaining 1/2 cup flour and 1 tablespoon cornmeal for the flour coating.
5. Dip each stuffed pepper in the batter, then dredge in the flour mixture.
6. Heat oil in a Dutch oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
7. Fry peppers, a few at a time, turning once, until golden brown on each side (about 1-2 minutes).
8. Drain on paper towels.
YIELD: About 12 appetizers
